description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and push, using the docker image for both jobs. In the build stage add a job named build:docker-images that runs a before_script `docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, sets the variable REGISTRY to `registry.gitlab.com/oly-exams/exam_tools/`, and executes the script `REGISTRY=${REGISTRY} TAG=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}-untested docker buildx bake -f docker/bake.hcl --push` with interruptible enabled. In the push stage add a job named push:docker-images that also runs the same docker login before_script, defines variables REGISTRY and GIT_DEPTH=1, and runs a script that loops over `django-server`, `celery-worker`, `nginx-with-static` to create image tags with `docker buildx imagetools create --tag ${REGISTRY}${stage_name}:${CI_COMMIT_SHA} ${REGISTRY}${stage_name}:${CI_COMMIT_SHA}-untested` and `docker buildx imagetools create --tag ${REGISTRY}${stage_name}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} ${REGISTRY}${stage_name}:${CI_COMMIT_SHA}-untested`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
